## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Teero and GrowthX to discuss content performance, strategy, and CMS updates.](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance showing positive early signals: 41 clicks in the last week, with some articles already ranking on page 1](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [New content writer (Sedera) with home-based experience added to the team](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [Workflows set up in AirOps, but grid setup still needed for full functionality](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [Potential for expanding into social media content and video creation discussed](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [17 articles published, gaining traction with 41 clicks in the last week (Jan 16-22)](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [Positive early signals, with some articles already ranking on page 1 (e.g., dental hygienist salary)](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Kyle noted this performance is faster than usual compared to other accounts](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)

### Content Creation Progress

  - [Half of the week's content created by Aida, half by Sedera (experienced GrowthX writer)](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [New content ready for Nate's review, including articles on 49ers](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Discussion on potential new topics: dental industry salary breakdown, oral care content](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)

### AirOps Workflow Setup

  - [Daniel set up workflows in AirOps, but grid setup still needed](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [Kyle explained the evolution of their workflow process:](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
      - [Now using API for more complex, self-contained workflows](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
      - [Grids allow for multiple workflows and step-by-step processes](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Discussion on potential quality differences between old and new workflow methods](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
  - [Agreement to have Daniel set up a grid for better understanding and comparison](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)

### Future Content Strategies

  - [Potential for expanding into social media content creation (Facebook, Instagram)](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
  - [Discussion on incorporating video content to drive more engagement](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
  - [Possibility of repurposing blog content for social channels and other formats (e.g., podcasts, webinars)](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)

### CMS Updates

  - [Frank confirmed the CMS is easy to use](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)
  - [Agreement to add more categories beyond "guys reports" (at least 2-3 new ones)](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [Confirmation that future images will be smaller in size](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nate to review ready content in the coming days](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Aida to add \~10 more assignments from existing batch and incorporate some of Nate's suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Daniel to be contacted to set up a grid in AirOps for better workflow visualization](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [Aida to inform Frank about adding new categories to the CMS](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [Team to consider strategies for expanding into social media content and potentially video creation](https://fathom.video/share/iHxRSSipJMa6w54jyVdgfvis6r94p1At?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
